attacking_style: Launches long-distance sprints (200m+) from technical positions on uphill/punchy finishes, bypassing pure power sprinters. Opportunistically attacks from breakaways in transition stages when points justify climbing effort.
team_tactics: Team executes attrition strategy on climbs to filter pure sprinters before finishes. Systematically targets intermediate sprint bonuses for GC/jersey gains. Often operates independently without traditional leadout train.
terrain_preference: Uphill drags and technical finishes where positioning trumps pure speed. Excels on selective parcours with climbs inside final 20km. Struggles on flat power sprints and pure climbing stages beyond his threshold.
vulnerability: Lacks explosive finishing speed against pure sprinters on flat finishes. Positioning failures in chaotic technical finales. Durability questionable across multi-day mountain stages. Mechanicals at critical moments (chain drops).
key_patterns: Won green jersey by targeting intermediate sprints and mountain stage points, not flat sprints (2017 TDF)
Launches early sprints from distance (200m+) to drain faster finishers' acceleration reserves (multiple observations)
Team filters field via climbing pace before sprint finishes, distances pure sprinters (Giro 2023, TDF 2017)
Hunts bonus seconds at intermediate sprints for GC/jersey gains over stage wins (Paris-Nice 2021, Romandie 2023)
Strong in 35km ITTs (4th Tour de Suisse 2018), expands threat beyond traditional sprinter profile
Competitive top-5 finishes on selective climbs unusual for sprinter (Fleche Wallonne, Tour de Suisse climbing stages)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed stage wins (Giro) and competitive sprints but mechanicals derailed GC attempts. Mixed results suggest plateau rather than clear upward/downward trend.
